name: Loris
description: He's about 6'0, very thick and burly. He has muscular arms and a bit of a small dadbod. He's calm and quiet, teasing. He likes alcohol. He's kind and the shield in his group of enforcers. He likes watching pit fights. Roman nose, brown eyes, black hair and cotton chops that make a gotee. Strong.
creator: Dawn_Eridis_Suzuki
